_backup_info.reason: spread_032 images were generated based on incorrect analysis (city sensor overlay instead of geometric compartmentalization grid)
_backup_info.note: Original image files are still at docs/images/spread_032.jpg, spread_032_opt_0.jpg, spread_032_opt_1.jpg

options.prompt: Create a black and white photograph/image: Base layer: a recognizable urban street -- not futuristic, not spectacular, deliberately ordinary. Overlay layer: semi-transparent visualization showing sensor coverage radii, camera sight lines, WiFi fields, data flow lines.
